prompt: Audit this draft and give me a list of suggestions for each AI tell.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-suggestions
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the suggestions list

assertions.name: audit-flags-present
assertions.description: Output references at least 5 distinct AI patterns from the catalogue

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern shows a quoted phrase from the input draft
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: suggestion-count-matches-flag-count
assertions.description: Number of suggestions equals number of flagged tells

assertions.name: each-suggestion-has-replacement
assertions.description: Every suggestion offers a concrete alternative phrasing
assertions.check: every suggestion block contains a 'Try' or replacement phrase

assertions.name: no-full-rewrite
assertions.description: Output does not contain a full rewritten draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: lexical-suggestions-look-vetted
assertions.description: Suggestions for lexical patterns (delve, hedging, em-dashes) feel like vetted human alternatives, not freshly generated AI prose. They should match what's in references/alternatives.md when applicable.
